description: This pipeline processes data by first converting it into an annotation table, then merging annotations and finally removing specific columns to produce the output, allowing for customized data grouping and filtering based on annotations.

286ddb0e-ee24-40f9-a364-7c713a54aa3c.name: table-remove-columns
286ddb0e-ee24-40f9-a364-7c713a54aa3c.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

6194d4b0-f62c-422f-a4d2-73e02e00be88.name: table-remove-columns
6194d4b0-f62c-422f-a4d2-73e02e00be88.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

b595c4e1-36f4-4fc2-9615-83a5050ff091.name: data-to-annotation-table
b595c4e1-36f4-4fc2-9615-83a5050ff091.description:
Converts data into an annotation table that contains all annotations of the data row. You can also add a string representation of the data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

1d128a57-9909-444f-b53d-e085e8a56603.name: annotation-merge
1d128a57-9909-444f-b53d-e085e8a56603.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
